title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindalco Industries - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindalco Industries - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Hindalco Industries is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hindalco Industries:
Hindalco Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindalco Industries!
